description: Tests that pin-deps freezes requirements.txt to known-good versions and verifies via tests + boot before shipping

tests.prompt: Jag vill lägga till requests i requirements.txt.
tests.expected_output_description: Pins the version, verifies tests and boot, doesn't blindly take latest

assertions.check: Output recommends pinning the version with == rather than a bare package name
Output mentions running the test suite (pytest) after adding the dependency
Output mentions verifying the app boots (e.g. AppTest or streamlit run) before shipping
Output does NOT advise blindly taking the latest version without checking

tests.prompt: Ett paket funkar lokalt men kraschar i produktion, varför?
tests.expected_output_description: Identifies unpinned/drifting dependency as root cause, recommends pinning

assertions.check: Output identifies an unpinned or version-drifted dependency as a likely cause
Output recommends pinning the exact known-good version with ==
Output mentions that Railway/redeploy reinstalls latest, causing 'works today breaks tomorrow'
